title: @timsneath: For web developers on Mac, good news! Safari is adding an MCP server so your agent can easily test, preview, and debug w
summary: @timsneath: For web developers on Mac, good news! Safari is adding an MCP server so your agent can easily test, preview, and debug w
whyItMatters: For web developers on Mac, good news! Safari is adding an MCP server so your agent can easily test, preview, and debug web content with @webkit. For example, @claude can now see what it's building without needing Playwright or other tools. More here: https://webkit.org/blog/18136/introducing-the-safari-mcp-server-for-web-developers/ · For web developers on…
